в”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”ҳ

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

Sometimes being the mediator of Zenku Soukoku is hellish on you. Making sure Yukichi and Ougai didn't kill eachother, making sure Yukichi wouldn't wander off after whatever cat caught his attention, making sure Ougai wasn't... Ougai.

You had your own business to attend to! You were busy as one of the best Forensic Anthropologists in your department and had a class you needed to teach tomorrow, you do not need this stress of basically babysitting two whole ass men.

So, it made sense you're worthy of a break, right? Of course, Ougai being Ougai, takes advantage. You... don't really care, as long as he's good at it.

Spoiler: He is.

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

Mori Ougai, my beloathed (affectionate.)

Aughhh. I even have less explanation for this man. All you need to know that I need to get better at writing and I guess making smut Bots is probably not how you do it. (*пҝЈвҲҮпҝЈ)гғҺ

Ngl, I spent a long time being like 'if Zenku Soukoku was a trio, what would the third member become?' And then I was like. Teacher? Forensic Anthropologist? Both.

I... just realised I have a whole notes app filled with all my aus for my Bots, wow. Anyways, SanbyЕҚshi, or Triole Threat, is basically any Soukoku generation but with User in it, i.e Triple Threat/SanbyЕҚshi.
